inputs.label: Coefficient (a)
inputs.businessContext: The significant digits of the number, typically between 1 and 10.

businessContext_i18n.en: The significant digits of the number, typically between 1 and 10.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sayının anlamlı basamakları, genellikle 1 ile 10 arasında.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die signifikanten Stellen der Zahl, typischerweise zwischen 1 und 10.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Les chiffres significatifs du nombre, généralement entre 1 et 10.

inputs.label: Value (optional)
inputs.businessContext: If provided, the calculator will convert this value to scientific notation.

businessContext_i18n.en: If provided, the calculator will convert this value to scientific notation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sağlanırsa, hesap aracı bu değeri bilimsel gösterime dönüştürür.
businessContext_i18n.de: Wenn angegeben, konvertiert der Rechner diesen Wert in wissenschaftliche Notation.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Si fourni, le calculateur convertira cette valeur en notation scientifique.

inputs.label: Decimal Precision
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places for the coefficient.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of decimal places for the coefficient.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Dezimalstellen für den Koeffizienten.
